title: tragacantha thessala
intro: Tragacantha thessala, also known as the Greek milk thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the thistle family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of silymarin, a bioactive compound with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Tragacantha thessala has been used to treat various health issues, including liver and gallbladder problems, as well as to support the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote liver health and detoxification.
